title: 151® Ready to USE Instant Filler Cartridge, 310ml
features: READY TO USE: 151 Instant Filler, ready mixed, no shrinkage, sagging or cracking after use. Ideal for indoor and outdoor repairs.
QUICK DRY, SMOOTH FINISH: 151 Instant Filler, sand down plaster, plasterboard, brick wood or stone, remove dust and debris. Fill with 151 Instant Filler and it will dry quickly, white and smooth.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: 151 Instant Filler, suitable for a wide range of indoor and outdoor repairs. Always ensure area is clean and dry before applying. Sand after filler is dry if required.
CRACKS, GAPS & HOLES: 151 Instant Filler, use around the home indoors and out to repair cracks, fill holes and gaps.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use instant filler cartridge, 310ml. Store at room temperature
